all.critique:
Overall, the analysis is very detailed and covers all the major functions that one would expect in a “utils.py” for this kind of experimental pipeline. There are, however, a few points that need extra attention:

1. Configuration Loading – load_config (and the optional reload_config):  
 • The description properly emphasizes error handling (including try/except for FileNotFoundError and yaml.YAMLError) and even mentions a fallback to default values. However, it doesn’t specify how those defaults
